creator: dan@langille.org
text:
Thanks for the patch.

I'm in the process of moving bacula-server-devel and bacula-client-
devel to production (i.e. bacula-server and bacula-client).  At the 
same time, I'm extracting the documentation to a new port, bacula-
docs.  There have been many changes to the bacula-server-devel port 
over the past few months and they need to go into bacula-server.

Your patch is great, works, but we need to bring stuff from the -
devel ports into production.

The new skeletons are here and I hope to finish with them today:

  http://www.langille.org/tmp/bacula-2.0.0.tgz

While I still have a few tinderbox tests to run on them, I would 
appreciate any comments that additional eyes can find.
